title: Nectar Spongebob
description: Replaces the model, texture, and audio of bees to that of the Nectar Spongebob meme.
body: This resource pack modifies the model, texture, and audio of bees to change it to that of Nectar Spongebob from https://youtu.be/zou5TIcbu8c. This resource pack also changes the name of certain items such as Honey Bottle to Nectar Bottle and Honey Block to Nectar Block.
